title: About Alli
content:
Each year, roughly 100.000 pregnancies are terminated, and about the same number of miscarriages. Despite being common, the topic is highly stigmatized. Education or even discourse around it is scarce. Adding to this, there's myths and misinformation on the internet. Getting medically sound, neutral information is hard. Alli attempts to bridge this gap: a digital companion, that is empathetic and personalized, backed with medical information. We want to support both patients as well as medical personnel with the App.
Alli accompanies persons with an involuntary or disrupted early pregnancy through the whole process of pregnancy termination. Step by step, the most relevant informations for the specific day are summarized. With answers to frequently asked questions, suggestions for handling side-effects, and simple explanations for medical terms, the app offers solid support.
Alli's content was developed by medical doctors, who themselves have practical experience in the field, and is in line with current international standards. All of their expertise, stemming from treating patients, their feedback, and frequent exchanges with colleagues, shaped the app.
functionalities:
Detailed instructions for your medical abortion at home
Frequently asked questions
Explanations, further resources, and a glossary
Medical informations concerning risks and side-effects
